info.title: Coupa
info.description: Connector for the Coupa procurement platform. Access purchase orders, invoices, requisitions, suppliers, and other procurement resources via the Coupa Core API.

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio. Exposes Coupa Core API operations via JSON-RPC 2.0.

get.description: Query suppliers in Coupa. Returns up to 50 results per page by default.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (max 50).

post.description: Create a new supplier in Coupa.

get.description: Get a specific supplier by ID.
Query users in Coupa.

post.description: Create a new user in Coupa.

get.description: Get a specific user by ID.
Query chart of accounts.
Get a specific account by ID.
Query departments.
Get a specific department by ID.
Query addresses.
Get a specific address by ID.
Query catalog items.
Get a specific catalog item by ID.
Query currencies.
Query payment terms.
Query exchange rates.
Query lookup values.
Query projects.
Get a specific project by ID.
Query purchase orders. For large data sets, always limit results with query criteria.

post.description: Create a purchase order as part of the external purchase orders feature. Do not use for Coupa-based POs.

get.description: Get a specific purchase order by ID.

put.description: Issue and send a purchase order to the supplier.

get.description: Query purchase order lines.
Query invoices. For large data sets, always limit results with query criteria.

post.description: Create an invoice in draft status.

line-level-taxation.description: Whether taxes are at line level.

get.description: Get a specific invoice by ID.

put.description: Submit a draft invoice for approval.
Void an approved invoice. Only works on invoices in approved, pending_receipt, or draft status.

get.description: Query requisitions.

post.description: Create a requisition in draft status.

get.description: Get a specific requisition by ID.
Query approvals.
Get a specific approval by ID.
Query expense reports.
Get a specific expense report by ID.
Query contracts.
Get a specific contract by ID.
Query receipts.
